title: SSV MIDWAY SR-2 // CREW FEED
_note: wt = Foundry game.time.worldTime (in-world seconds), the sortable timestamp; display formatted at render. Reactions are a single map keyed by CREW MEMBER ID with values 'up' (like) or 'down' (dislike) — one entry per member (like XOR dislike). Keys MUST be real crew collection ids; the tooltip resolves id -> nickname (or full name) at render, so an id with no matching crew member would show the raw id. Counts/tooltips derive from this map. Anchored to ref now=69009558720: post-003 (~12h, pinned+Notice) 4 up / 1 down; post-002 (~2d) 3 up / 1 down; post-001 (~4d) 1 up / 2 down; post-000 (~11d) 1 up, archived at default 7-day.

posts.author: Johanna Byas
posts.body: A reminder to the crew: requisitions are for mission-critical equipment. The requisitions board is not a wishlist. Requests will be reviewed on the basis of operational need, and I will be applying that standard generously to myself and sparingly to everyone else. Thank you for your understanding.

posts.author: James Markov
posts.body: Drive's running clean after the recalibration. Whoever tracked down that calibration kit, you have my thanks. She hasn't purred like this since we acquired her.

posts.author: Juliso Ennidos
posts.body: Still no Cobra launcher in requisitions. I remain available to discuss.

posts.author: Tariv Domitus
posts.body: Old comms check from the shakedown run. If you can read this, the relay's holding. Archiving for posterity.
